title: Realistic sun and moon KD
description: This resource pack replaces the sun and the moon with a drawn one.
body:
ResourcePack which replaces the usual moon and sun. They turn into a circle, but they were drawn in Photoshop. **There are some small flaws.**

**Beautiful sun** 
![Image1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/956e3d2a81213dc2df64cf3eb6c5dd683feca08c.jpeg)

**Beautiful sunset**
![Image2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53e3a37b557e3957194cf5f57043bc5d903240aa.jpeg)

**The night is beautiful isn't it?**
![Image3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f01a0aef3f4ffce5b8d35cb9b98efc0140e4ac7.jpeg)
